MELSubItem.Title: Red Upper and Lower Fuselage Beacon Lights

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided white tail and wing tip strobe lights operate normally.

OperationNote.Para: There are four white strobe lights (two wing tip and two tail) and the two red beacon lights (upper and lower). If some but not all lights are inoperative in a system, the remaining operative lights may be used by selecting the associated switch ON.

ListItem.Para: At least one white tail or wing tip strobe light operates normally.
Operations are not conducted during night.

OperationNote.Para: There are four white strobe lights (two wing tip and two tail) and the two red beacon lights (upper and lower). If some but not all lights are inoperative in a system, the remaining operative lights may be used by selecting the associated switch ON.

MELSubItem.Title: White Tail and Wing Tip Strobe Lights

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided red upper and lower fuselage beacon lights operate normally.

OperationNote.Para: There are four white strobe lights (two wing tip and two tail) and the two red beacon lights (upper and lower). If some but not all lights are inoperative in a system, the remaining operative lights may be used by selecting the associated switch ON.

ListItem.Para: At least one red fuselage beacon light operates normally.
Operations are not conducted during night.

OperationNote.Para: There are four white strobe lights (two wing tip and two tail) and the two red beacon lights (upper and lower). If some but not all lights are inoperative in a system, the remaining operative lights may be used by selecting the associated switch ON.
